**Bridge rationale:** Emptiness — dissolution of self, DMN decoupling, ego dissolution, nondual awareness.

**Altered Self-Referential-Related Brain Regions in Depersonalization-Derealization Disorder.**. Brain Behav.. PMID: 39935045. DOI: 10.1002/brb3.70314. OBJECTIVE: We aimed to explore the alteration in topology and network properties in self-referential-related brain regions of individuals with depersonalization-derealization disorders (DPD), using evidence from resting-state functional magnetic resonance imaging (rs-fMRI).
